task_completion.description: Discontinue the incorrectly entered Amiodarone prescription.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's eChart or medication list, Amiodarone should be marked as discontinued, archived, or no longer visible under active medications.

task_completion.description: Add an allergy for ASA (Acetylsalicylic Acid).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's allergies section, 'ASA' or 'Acetylsalicylic Acid' is listed as an allergy.

task_completion.description: The ASA allergy has a reaction of Gastrointestinal upset and Moderate severity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The allergy entry for ASA shows the reaction 'Gastrointestinal upset' and severity 'Moderate' (or 'mo').

task_completion.description: Prescribe Metformin for the patient's diabetes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's active medication list or prescription summary, 'Metformin' is listed as a prescribed drug.

task_completion.description: The Metformin prescription specifies 500mg by mouth twice daily.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Next to the Metformin prescription, the dosage is explicitly '500mg' and the frequency is 'twice daily', 'bid', or '2 times a day'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OSCAR EMR web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OSCAR EMR system, not terminal windows executing database queries or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent modified the record for the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name 'Fatima Al-Hassan' is visible in the eChart or prescription screens where changes are made.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open in the screenshots to manipulate the displayed text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Fatima Al-Hassan (DOB: 1978-08-09). Task requires three actions in OSCAR EMR: 1. Discontinue Amiodarone (initially active, 200mg od). 2. Add allergy: ASA (Acetylsalicylic Acid), Reaction: Gastrointestinal upset, Severity: Moderate. 3. Prescribe new medication: Metformin, Dose: 500mg, Frequency: twice daily (bid). The system is accessed via http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp.
